section.title: AI Use Across Project Phases
section.description: This section focuses on project management phases (often referred to as process groups). For each phase below, indicate how frequently you use AI tools to support related activities.

questions.text: For each project phase below, indicate how often you use AI tools to assist with activities in that phase.
questions.hint: Consider both standalone AI tools and AI features embedded in project management or delivery tools. Select one option per row.

rows.label: **Initiating**
rows.description: Defining a new project or phase; establishing project vision, objectives, and stakeholder alignment

rows.label: **Planning**
rows.description: Defining scope and objectives; developing plans, estimates, schedules, and risk responses

rows.label: **Executing**
rows.description: Performing the work defined in the plan; coordinating teams, stakeholders, and resources

rows.label: **Monitoring & Controlling**
rows.description: Tracking progress, assessing performance, and managing changes to maintain alignment with the plan

rows.label: **Closing**
rows.description: Finalizing activities, completing deliverables, capturing lessons learned, and formally closing the project or phase
